note: CANDIDATES from M1 headroom mining. REQUIRE human review (set reviewed_by, fix/drop bad labels) before merging into qc/lessons-queries.json. _raw_rank/_source_title are provenance fields to strip on merge.

queries.query: How to ensure an active process uses original data instead of updated rules?
queries._source_title: Sprint 15.10: persist per-level body snapshot on request — honor B.7 snapshot-the-rules

queries.query: How to safely stop processing all items in a collection without losing data or locking?
Why are some event messages using different keys for the same status information?
queries._source_title: Sprint 15.10: event-payload field rename from degraded_to to escalated_to

queries.query: Why are identical content items being merged when they belong to different owners or categories?
queries._source_title: Retrieval dedup keys should include project_id + lesson_type beyond content hash

queries.query: How to prevent multiple instances from running the same cleanup job simultaneously?
queries._source_title: Sprint 13.2 — F1 TTL sweep + Active Work GUI shipped via 6-round AMAW longrun (3 design + 3 code Adversary rounds, max-cap each)

queries.query: Why are background cleanup tasks blocking other scheduled maintenance processes for too long?
queries._source_title: Sprint 15.7: per-cycle K=10 cap on stuck-closing recovery — bound advisory-lock hold

queries.query: Why does deleting parent records fail due to remaining linked child entries in tests?
queries._source_title: Sprint 15.7: test cleanup must delete chained tasks/artifacts before topics on carried-motion tests

queries.query: Why does adding more difficult examples fail to lower my performance scores?
queries._source_title: Broadening a saturated goldenset may not dilute aggregate MRR if MRR uses best-rank-only

queries.query: Why do certain pages flicker or show incorrect states during initial page load?
queries._source_title: NoProjectGuard: hydration-safe guard for data pages

queries.query: Why are our measurement metrics producing incorrect values without triggering any system errors?
queries._source_title: /review-impl adversarial review catches silent-false-confidence bugs POST-REVIEW misses

queries.query: How to catch more bugs and errors during the final verification stage of development?
queries._source_title: Invoke /review-impl by default during POST-REVIEW; it earns its keep across sprint types

queries.query: How to prevent unauthorized access when a user provides incomplete or unverified identifiers?
queries._source_title: Three recurring bypass patterns in tenant-scope work — grep these in every authz PR

queries.query: How to fix a module loading loop when two files require each other?
queries._source_title: Sprint 15.5: circular dep intake.ts/disputes.ts — dynamic import inside triageIntake

queries.query: Why does adjusting the weight parameter fail to change results for new datasets?
queries._source_title: Salience blend is a no-op when no candidate lessons have access-log history — α irrelevant on bootstrap-only corpus

queries.query: How to choose the right intensity of review cycles based on the level of risk?
queries._source_title: Phase 13 longrun closeout: 6 sprints, 4 sessions, hybrid AMAW mode trade-offs across full/compressed/hyper-compressed

queries.query: Why are build artifacts and session files being stored in the database?
queries._source_title: index_project default excludes cover .git + node_modules only; dist/ .next/ .claude/ leak into the chunks table

queries.query: How to accurately measure performance improvements when the baseline changes between test periods?
queries._source_title: A/B ranking metrics: delta-from-control, not raw cross-sprint MRR

queries.query: Why are performance variations being flagged as regressions when they are actually within expected jitter?
queries._source_title: Benchmark diff generator must consume noise_floor or the data is useless
